description: The entity identifies, selects, and develops risk mitigation activities for risks arising from potential business disruptions.

subcriteria.name: business_continuity
subcriteria.reference_text: Business continuity plan documenting procedures for maintaining operations during disruptions. Covers communication plans, alternate processing sites, and recovery priorities. Key personnel and their backup contacts identified.

subcriteria.name: disaster_recovery
subcriteria.reference_text: Disaster recovery plan with RTO and RPO targets for critical systems. Backup procedures configured with daily incremental and weekly full backups. Recovery procedures tested annually. Multi-region or multi-availability-zone architecture for high availability.

subcriteria.name: insurance
subcriteria.reference_text: Cyber insurance policy or general liability insurance covering security incidents, data breaches, and business interruption. Insurance coverage reviewed annually.

mismatch_signals.reason: Access management is CC6.x, not business disruption mitigation.
Ethics and conduct policies are CC1.1, not business disruption.
